features: Fruity and Fresh Top Notes: Features vibrant top notes of apple, black currant, grapefruit, and lychee for a refreshing and lively opening
Romantic Floral Heart: Delicate heart notes of jasmine, rose, and raspberry create a sweet, feminine, and romantic essence
Warm and Sensual Base: Base notes of vanilla, amber, and musk provide a rich, warm, and long-lasting foundation that lingers beautifully
Long-Lasting Fragrance: As an Eau de Parfum (EDP), this perfume offers a high concentration of fragrance oils, ensuring it lasts throughout the day
Versatile for Any Occasion: Suitable for everyday wear, casual outings, romantic evenings, and special events, making it a versatile addition to your fragrance collection
Perfect Balance of Fruity and Floral: Combines fruity freshness with floral elegance, creating a scent that’s both refreshing and graceful
description: Product Description La Fede Aura Kiss of Rose Eau de Parfum 100ml by Khadlaj – Rose Perfume – Long lasting Eau de Parfum for women with fruity and floral notes La Fede Aura Kiss of Rose Eau de Parfum is a romantic, floral-fruity fragrance that radiates elegance, charm, and sweetness. It opens with a vibrant fusion of apple, black currant, grapefruit, and lychee, offering a fresh, juicy start that captures the senses. The heart blossoms into a lush blend of raspberry, jasmine, and rose, creating a soft yet vibrant floral experience that feels both modern and timeless. At the base, warm notes of vanilla, amber, and musk provide a smooth, lasting trail that wraps the skin in gentle sensuality. Crafted for women who embrace grace and sophistication, Kiss of Rose by Khadlaj is a celebration of femininity. Made with premium ingredients and exquisite detail, this Eau de Parfum is a long-lasting fragrance that’s equally suited for day-to-night wear, making it a signature scent for those who love elegance with a playful twist. Aura Kiss of Rose 100ml Eau de Parfum – A Scent of Romance Top Notes Opens with a juicy medley of Apple, Black Currant, Grapefruit, and Lychee, creating a vibrant fruity-floral introduction that’s fresh, playful, and effortlessly feminine, a bright start to this charming women’s perfume. Heart Notes Unfolds into a delicate floral blend of Raspberry, Jasmine, and Rose. This romantic heart offers softness and elegance, balancing sweetness with a graceful floral depth. Base Notes Dries down to a warm, lasting base of Vanilla, Amber, and Musk, delivering creamy comfort and gentle allure. A signature scent for women who exude charm, beauty, and confidence. Beautiful Packaging and a Perfect Gift Captivating Fragrance: Aura Kiss of Rose by Khadlaj is a radiant women’s perfume with apple, lychee, rose, and vanilla, designed to charm with every spritz and leave a lasting floral-fruity impression Everyday Sophistication: This elegant scent pairs juicy fruits with soft florals and warm base notes, perfect for day-to-night wear and timeless feminine appeal Elegant Packaging: Presented in a luxurious bottle with gold detailing, Kiss of Rose is beautifully boxed, ideal for gifting on birthdays, anniversaries, or personal milestones Gift of Elegance: A graceful fragrance for women who embrace style and emotion, Aura Kiss of Rose celebrates softness, beauty, and inner confidence

product_details_tab_data.Title: La Fede Aura Kiss of Rose Eau de Parfum Spray for Women - 100ml | Fruity Floral Fragrance with Apple Rose Vanilla & Musk
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Fragrances › Women › Eau de Parfum
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Everyday Wear: Perfect for adding a touch of freshness and elegance to your daily routine.,Special Occasions: Ideal for romantic evenings, weddings, or formal events.,Date Nights: Its sensual and feminine scent makes it great for intimate moments.,Work/Office: A light yet sophisticated fragrance suitable for professional settings.,Gifting: A thoughtful gift for birthdays, anniversaries, or holidays.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Refreshing and Uplifting: The fruity top notes of apple, black currant, grapefruit, and lychee provide a vibrant and energizing start, boosting your mood throughout the day, Romantic and Feminine: The delicate floral heart of jasmine, rose, and raspberry adds a sweet and romantic touch, perfect for women who embrace elegance and grace, Sensual and Warm: The rich base notes of vanilla, amber, and musk deliver a comforting, sensual, and long-lasting scent, ideal for creating a memorable impression, Long-Lasting Fragrance: As an Eau de Parfum (EDP), this fragrance has a higher concentration of oils, ensuring it lasts throughout the day with just a few sprays, Versatile for Any Occasion: Whether for everyday wear, romantic evenings, or special events, this fragrance adapts to any occasion, providing a versatile scent experience, Perfect Balance of Freshness and Warmth: The combination of fruity freshness and warm base notes makes the perfume suitable for both day and night, allowing a smooth transition from casual to formal settings
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with water.
